name: William McRaven
summary: Retired four-star admiral who oversaw the raid that killed Osama bin Laden and publicly criticized Trump in a 2018 Washington Post op-ed after the Brennan clearance revocation.

keyStatements.quote: I would consider it an honor if you would revoke my security clearance as well, so I can add my name to the list of men and women who have spoken up against your presidency.
keyStatements.context: After Trump revoked John Brennan's clearance

keyStatements.quote: If you think for a moment that your McCarthy-era tactics will suppress the voices of criticism, you are sadly mistaken. The criticism will continue until you become the leader we prayed you would be.
This president has shown that he is willing to attack the very institutions that keep our democracy intact. That is the greatest threat to democracy in my lifetime.

timeline.event: Oversaw raid that killed Osama bin Laden

timeline.significance: Led all U.S. special operations forces

timeline.event: Chancellor of University of Texas System
Published op-ed asking Trump to revoke his clearance
timeline.significance: Criticized attacks on officials and the press

timeline.event: Warned Trump's attacks on media were a threat to democracy
timeline.significance: Criticized attacks on press and institutions

credibility.background: Four-star admiral who led the raid that killed Osama bin Laden, commanded all U.S. special operations forces

oppositionReasons: Criticized Trump's attacks on critics and the press
Said Trump's attacks on institutions threaten democracy

sources.title: Adm. William H. McRaven asks Trump to revoke his security clearance
McRaven calls Trump's attacks on media a threat to democracy
